description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a metallic handle and lever mechanism at the top, accompanied by a silver safety pin and a circular ring. A black rubber hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side with a black bracket, ending in a nozzle. The body features several labels, including a large white instruction label with pictograms and text, and a maintenance or inspection tag attached to the front. The extinguisher is equipped with a pressure gauge located at the top, adjacent to the handle, which is round and features colored markings. The overall construction is robust, with a glossy painted metal surface and visible seams at the top and bottom. This type of extinguisher is commonly found mounted on walls in public or private urban spaces for emergency use.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, metallic handle, pressure gauge, and multiple instructional labels. It features a safety pin and inspection tag, with a glossy metal finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inspection tag, safety pin, handle, and the black hose secured to the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large instructional label with pictograms and the ABC fire class markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hose attachment, pressure gauge, and additional label details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cylinder, the hose bracket, and the mounting strap.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple labels are visible: a large white instruction label with black text and pictograms on the side, a yellow ABC fire class label, and a white inspection tag attached to the front.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black mounting bracket or strap is visible around the lower part of the cylinder, securing the hose and likely used for wall mounting.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black rubber hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured with a bracket; the hose ends in a nozzle.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present at the top near the handle, with colored markings visible.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A silver safety pin with a circular pull ring is visible at the top, inserted through the handle mechanism.
